This is a comprehensive list of dependencies used for the realization of this project.
All of the dependencies can be installed using the sudo apt install command, except the first two where it is needed to follow the steps on the official website.

ros2 (https://docs.ros.org/en/jazzy/Installation/Ubuntu-Install-Debs.html)
Pangolin (https://github.com/stevenlovegrove/Pangolin)

gedit
plocate
ros-jazzy-xacro
libfuse2t64
ros-jazzy-image-transport-plugins
net-tools
ros-jazzy-ros-gz-sim
ros-jazzy-rviz2
ros-jazzy-robot-state-publisher
build-essential
cmake
git
pkg-config
libgoogle-glog-dev
libgflags-dev
libsqlite3-dev
libglew-dev
libssl-dev
libopencv-dev
libeigen3-dev
ros-jazzy-cv-bridge
ros-jazzy-image-transport
ros-jazzy-sensor-msgs
ros-jazzy-tf2-ros
ros-jazzy-tf2-geometry-msgs
ros-jazzy-camera-calibration
ros-jazzy-image-pipeline
ninja-build
ros-jazzy-rosbag2
ros-jazzy-camera-calibration
